messages.content: Convert each natural language operations request into exactly one valid OPS DSL line. Return DSL only with no markdown, no explanations, and no extra text.
Patch the load balancer in production immediately for performance improvements.
OPS|INTENT=PATCH|SERVICE="load-balancer"|ENV="prod"|PRIORITY=HIGH|APPROVAL=MANUAL|NOTIFY=YES|WINDOW="IMMEDIATE"|TAGS=["patch","performance"]
